allow: PowerShell(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {connectDB,closeDB}=require\('./src/config/db'\); connectDB\(\).then\(\(\)=>{ console.log\('SUCCESS'\); return closeDB\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\('FAIL:', e.message\); }\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {connectDB,closeDB}=require\('./src/config/db'\); connectDB\(\).then\(\(\)=>{ console.log\('SUCCESS'\); return closeDB\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\('FAIL:', e.message\); }\)")

PowerShell(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {connectDB,closeDB}=require\('./src/config/db'\); const Article=require\('./src/models/Article'\); connectDB\(\).then\(async\(\)=>{ await Article.findOne\(\); console.log\('Schema OK'\); return closeDB\(\); }\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\);")
